# Checklist

- [ ] I ran the [link-check script from CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#link-check-script) and all internal links resolve
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased"
- [ ] I updated the "Last verified" date in `README.md` if this brings us up to date
- [ ] No real TINs / credentials / cert private keys in examples
- [ ] No raw verbatim content from copyrighted PDFs (summarized / paraphrased with attribution)
- [ ] New content follows the naming conventions in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
